Title: Browser Threat Alert: High Severity Event
Executive_Summary: A user navigated to file:///Users/akashsingh/Downloads/docs/git/browser-security/tests/mock_benign.html. The system detected an overall severity of High.
Key_Indicators: The visual analysis indicates the presence of ACME Corp branding, which matches the content of the page.
The page contains a credential harvesting login form, which is a common tactic used in phishing attacks.
The URL is a local file path, which is unusual for legitimate login pages and suggests a potential phishing attempt.
There is no contradiction between the visual analysis and the final URL, but the context of a local file path raises suspicion.
Recommended_Mitigation: Do not enter any credentials on this page. Verify the legitimacy of the login page by checking the URL and ensuring it is hosted on a trusted domain. Report this page to your IT security team for further analysis.
